title: nullable_serialization_version bad get with index
description:
### Describe the bug
Not sure if real issue. The Fiddle uses a minmax index, but I am not sure if it's related to it. Also reproduces with `nullable_serialization_version = 0`.
### How to reproduce
Run Fiddle: https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/d2d35dcb-ca4b-4dc0-acf1-05304ea8316a
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> executeQuery: Code: 170. DB::Exception: Bad get: has UInt64, requested String. (BAD_GET) (version 25.12.1.244 (official build)) (from 127.0.0.1:53106) (query 1, line 1) (in query: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String, INDEX i0 c0 TYPE minmax) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS nullable_serialization_version = 1, allow_experimental_full_text_index = 1;), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000025943eb2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:129: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x0000000015c57f29
2. src/Common/Exception.h:123: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d9930ce
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d992c11
4. src/Common/Exception.h:141: DB::Exception::Exception<std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>, std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>>::type, std::type_identity<std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>>::type>, std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>&&, std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>&&) @ 0x000000001a859cb6
5. src/Core/Field.cpp:874: DB::NearestFieldTypeImpl<__decay(String), void>::Type& DB::Field::safeGet<String>() & @ 0x000000001a85ad2b
6. src/Core/Field.h:440: DB::MergeTreeSettingsTraits::Accessor::instance()::$_0::operator()() const::'lambda22'(DB::MergeTreeSettingsTraits::Data&, DB::Field const&)::__invoke(DB::MergeTreeSettingsTraits::Data&, DB::Field const&) @ 0x000000001f05044c
7. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeSettings.cpp:2079: DB::BaseSettings<DB::MergeTreeSettingsTraits>::set(std::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char>>, DB::Field const&) @ 0x000000001f08d706
8. src/Core/BaseSettings.h:323: DB::MergeTreeSettingsImpl::loadFromQuery(DB::ASTStorage&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, bool) @ 0x000000001f046391
9. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeSettings.cpp:2448: DB::MergeTreeSettings::loadFromQuery(DB::ASTStorage&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, bool) @ 0x000000001f048f24
10. src/Storages/MergeTree/registerStorageMergeTree.cpp:712: DB::create(DB::StorageFactory::Arguments const&) @ 0x000000001f1e7c45
11. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:508: ? @ 0x000000001e6e6586
12. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1966: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::doCreateTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&, DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::TableProperties const&, std::unique_ptr<DB::DDLGuard, std::default_delete<DB::DDLGuard>>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel) @ 0x000000001bc92de8
13. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1744: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::createTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&) @ 0x000000001bc8bf9a
14. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:2392: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001bc99412
15. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1700: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>, DB::QueryResultDetails&) @ 0x000000001c07f5ad
16. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1921: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001c07a0d2
17. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:765: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001f58b46a
18. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2861: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001f5a60e4
19. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x00000000259fbdc7
20. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x00000000259fc3a5
21. base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205: Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x0000000025999a7f
22. base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341: Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) @ 0x0000000025997211
23. ? @ 0x00000000000a3d64
24. __GI___clone3 @ 0x00000000001373bc
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR);
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.value, b.description FROM test_table AS a LEFT JOIN another_table AS b ON a.id = b.ref_id WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: nullable_serialization_version causes bad get with index
